title: You Are With Me

sections.label: Verse 1
lines: You are the Shepherd, I will not want
You lead me down to water that is still
You lay me in the green of quiet pastures
You restore the parts of me that time can't heal

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: I don't know the road that lies before me
But I know the hand that holds me as I go
Every shadow starts to soften —

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, I walk through the valley of the shadow
And I fear no evil — You are with me
Your rod and staff are a language of mercy
And I fear no evil — You are with me
Oh, You are with me

sections.label: Verse 2
lines: You set a table where my enemies are watching
You anoint my head with oil and with grace
My cup is an ocean always overflowing
Every hunger finds its quiet in this place

sections.label: Pre-Chorus
lines: I don't know what's waiting in the morning
But I know the One who calls me by my name
Every shadow starts to whisper —

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, I walk through the valley of the shadow
And I fear no evil — You are with me
Your rod and staff are a language of mercy
And I fear no evil — You are with me
Oh, You are with me

sections.label: Bridge
lines: Goodness, mercy, walking right behind me
All my days, all my days
And the house of love is holding me, is holding me
The home I've always known
Oh, the home I've always known

sections.label: Chorus
lines: Oh, I walk through the valley of the shadow
And I fear no evil — You are with me
Though I walk, though I walk through the shadow
I will fear no evil — You are with me
Oh, You are with me

sections.label: Outro
lines: Surely goodness, surely mercy
Following me all my days
I will dwell in the house of light
I will dwell in the light of Your grace

epigraph: though I walk through the valley of the shadow of death
